description: Inventories of goods and their values. In Judaeo-Arabic. There are several subsections: (1) the thabāt(?) of the orphans/heqdesh; (2) a claim against the wife of Naḥrīr(?), beginning with an Andalusian lamp; (3) 'The remainder of this qumāsh (dowry) with the wife'; (4) something to do with the synagogue; (5) a certain deposit (al-mawdūʿ al-...); and perhaps further subsections.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
